messagePreview: Hi Raj, following up on your Tuesday consultation booking — please confirm your preferred time slot.
Hi Neha, just checking in on your after-hours consultation request. We have evening slots available this week.
Hi Dev, I wanted to share our Team Plan details and arrange a quick 20-minute demo for your team of 12.
Vikram, calling to follow up on the enterprise plan discussion from last week as promised.
Hi Ananya, confirming that your ticket #TKT-2291 has been fully resolved. Please let us know if you need anything else!
